# LaunchFactory - From Zero to Live

## Site Description
A step-by-step guide to building and launching a real online product (Hook Generator) in one weekend using AI tools. No coding experience required.

## Product Details
- **Name:** From Zero to Live: Vibe Code Your First Online Product in a Weekend
- **Price:** $27 (founders price)
- **Format:** Digital ebook (PDF)
- **Author:** Manny Zabala (@rutadba)

## What You'll Learn
- Set up GitHub and Antigravity accounts
- Use Claude Code to build a complete web tool
- Create 100+ hook templates for social media
- Deploy live to Render with your own domain
- Embed email capture forms with Tally

## Tech Stack Covered
Antigravity, GitHub, Claude Code, Render, Tally, Namecheap

## Contact
Email: hola@rutadba.com

## Purchase Flow
1. User clicks CTA on landing page
2. Redirected to Gumroad/payment link
3. After payment, redirected to thank-you page
4. Product delivered via email confirmation
